name: GlobalTalent Relocation
description: Multi-stage agentic case for global talent relocation. Orchestrates document verification, compliance checking, human approvals, and relocation guide generation across AI agents and HR staff.

stages.name: Intake
stages.description: Candidate case is received and queued for processing. Files are uploaded and case metadata is captured.

stages.name: Document Verification
stages.description: AI agent (DocSentry) extracts fields from uploaded documents. Supports passports, visas, employment letters, bank statements via OCR + LLM.

stages.name: Document Renewal
stages.description: Expired documents detected. Case is paused for candidate to provide renewed documents. HR is notified via Slack with interactive buttons.

stages.name: Manual Review
stages.description: AI confidence was low or documents failed OCR. An HR specialist reviews the extracted data and approves or rejects.

actions.title: Review candidate documents
actions.description: Verify the extracted document fields and approve or request corrections.

stages.name: Compliance Check
stages.description: AI agent (ComplianceAgent) checks documents against destination country visa rules using RAG (ChromaDB) + live Brave web search.

stages.name: Compliance Remediation
stages.description: Compliance check failed. HR reviews the reasons and decides whether to request new documents, escalate, or override.

stages.name: HR Review
stages.description: Final human approval gate. HR manager reviews compliance results and candidate profile, then approves or rejects.

actions.title: Approve or reject relocation case
actions.description: Review the compliance check results and candidate profile before making a final decision.

stages.name: Relocation Planning
stages.description: AI agent (RelocationAgent) generates a personalized relocation guide with neighbourhoods, schools, cost estimates, and a 30-day checklist.

stages.name: Completed
stages.description: All stages complete. Relocation guide delivered. Case closed.

stages.name: Rejected
stages.description: Case rejected by HR. Candidate notified.

stages.name: Escalated
stages.description: Case escalated to senior management for resolution.

stages.name: Info Requested
stages.description: Additional information requested from candidate. Case pauses until response received.

integrations.name: GlobalTalent API
integrations.description: Python backend server hosting AI agents and case management API

integrations.name: HR Slack Workspace
integrations.description: Slack integration for notifications and interactive approvals (Approve/Reject/Request Info)
